tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Sometimes we fall down and can't get back up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
We're hiding behind skin that's too tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
How come we don't say I love you enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Till it's too late, it's not too late[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Our hearts are hungry for a food that won't come[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
And we could make feast from these crumbs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
And we're all staring down the barrel of a gun[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
So if your life flashed before you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
What would you wish you would've done[/tab]


[Chorus]

Yeah, gotta start
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Lookin' at the hand of the[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Time we've been given here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
This is all we got and we gotta start pickin' it[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Every second counts on a clock that's tickin'[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Gotta live like we're dying[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
We gotta tell 'em that we love 'em[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
While we got the chance to say[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
Gotta live like we're dying[/tab]
